summary: Code review allows PR #268 at head 1c529a4. Exact Harbor response binding, Lode pin validation, failure taxonomy mapping, unknown-outcome HTTP semantics, refs-only persistence, and XHS/BOSS contract tests have no remaining P0/P1/P2 findings. Contract duplication remains a non-blocking P3 advisory. This does not close live E2E scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-11 UTC current worktree passed focused Core/API typecheck, tests, API build/self-check/process-self-check, root `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, `git diff --check`, and `loom fact-chain`. Independent review found no remaining P0/P1/P2 issues after the `unknown_outcome` HTTP status fix. Evidence is contract/mock validation only; no live site completion is claimed.
follow_ups: P3 advisory: move duplicated Harbor/Lode trust-boundary parsing and exact response fixtures into a focused shared-schema module in a separately bounded refactor.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored implementation review approved the reviewed product head; subsequent review-record-only drift is non-semantic.
